note: SWIFT GPI tracker state machine + Universal Confirmation SLA. Vector 1: ACSP->ACCC within 24h SLA (valid). Vector 2: invalid transition from terminal ACCC state. Vector 3: empty-input finite.

vectors.name: acsp_to_accc_within_sla
vectors.description: Valid ACSP->ACCC transition within the 24h Universal Confirmation SLA. Expected green.

output_payload.stage_description: Accepted and in settlement process -- correspondent acknowledged the payment, settlement underway.
output_payload.transition_reason: ACSP -> ACCC is a valid GPI lifecycle transition.
output_payload.sla_note: Universal Confirmation SLA met: ACCC sent 12.0h after ACSP (limit 24h).
output_payload.pii_note: Payment amount used only for context. No party PII processed. Use synthetic amounts and UETR values for testing.
output_payload.table_source: SWIFT GPI Tracker specification (swift.com/our-solutions/global-financial-messaging/swift-gpi); SWIFT Innotribe GPI Universal Confirmation SLA rules; ISO 20022 pacs.002 ExternalPaymentTransactionStatus1Code
output_payload.regulatory_basis: SWIFT GPI Universal Confirmation rules; ISO 20022 pacs.002 ExternalPaymentTransactionStatus1Code; SWIFT GPI Tracker service description

vectors.name: invalid_transition_from_terminal
vectors.description: Attempt to transition from terminal state ACCC to ACSP -- invalid. State machine rejects.

output_payload.stage_description: Accepted and credit completed -- funds credited to beneficiary account. Terminal state.
output_payload.transition_reason: ACCC is a terminal state. No further status transitions are allowed.

issues.message: ACCC is a terminal state. No further status transitions are allowed.

output_payload.pii_note: Payment amount used only for context. No party PII processed. Use synthetic amounts and UETR values for testing.
output_payload.table_source: SWIFT GPI Tracker specification (swift.com/our-solutions/global-financial-messaging/swift-gpi); SWIFT Innotribe GPI Universal Confirmation SLA rules; ISO 20022 pacs.002 ExternalPaymentTransactionStatus1Code
output_payload.regulatory_basis: SWIFT GPI Universal Confirmation rules; ISO 20022 pacs.002 ExternalPaymentTransactionStatus1Code; SWIFT GPI Tracker service description

vectors.name: empty_input_finite
vectors.description: All inputs absent. Verifies finite output with no NaN/Infinity. current_status absent error, null transition.

issues.message: current_status is required. Valid GPI status codes: PDNG, ACSP, ACSP/ACWC, ACCC, RJCT.

output_payload.pii_note: Payment amount used only for context. No party PII processed. Use synthetic amounts and UETR values for testing.
output_payload.table_source: SWIFT GPI Tracker specification (swift.com/our-solutions/global-financial-messaging/swift-gpi); SWIFT Innotribe GPI Universal Confirmation SLA rules; ISO 20022 pacs.002 ExternalPaymentTransactionStatus1Code
output_payload.regulatory_basis: SWIFT GPI Universal Confirmation rules; ISO 20022 pacs.002 ExternalPaymentTransactionStatus1Code; SWIFT GPI Tracker service description
